mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( DEPT_ID ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY DEPT_ID ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) DEPT_ID FROM T_PRD_GROUP_DETAIL WHERE GROUP_ID =#{id} GROUP BY GROUP_ID, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME

SELECT ID, GROUP_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, SALARY_TYPE_NAME, SALARY_TYPE_CODE, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_GROUP where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT DEPT_ID "deptId",DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY where WORK_PLAN_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = 2 GROUP BY DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME
SELECT A .PROCESS_CD "processCode", A .PROCESS_NM "processName" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS A WHERE A .PARENT_ID = ( SELECT ID FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT ID, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME FROM T_PRD_GROUP_DETAIL WHERE GROUP_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEPT_ID IN ( SELECT DEPT_ID "deptId" FROM T_PRD_ATTENDANCE WHERE TO_CHAR (WORK_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') = #{workDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CLASS_CODE = #{classCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT DEPT_ID "deptId" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = 2 GROUP BY DEPT_ID ) ORDER BY PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE,DEPT_NAME
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_GROUP SET GROUP_NAME = #{groupName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{salaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{salaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLAN_TYPE_CD = #{planTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLAN_TYPE_NAME = #{planTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_GROUP (ID, GROUP_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, SALARY_TYPE_CODE, SALARY_TYPE_NAME, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{groupName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
